# Always Link Solutions

> IT consulting shop based in Bangkok, Thailand. We design and operate sober, durable technical infrastructure for SME across Southeast Asia — Proxmox clusters, Docker, Linux, Odoo ERP, self-hosted AI (RAG + LLM pipelines), and automation with n8n.

We focus on systems that keep running in production, without requiring a dashboard, an account manager, or a vendor lock-in. Clients stay owners of their code, their data, and their admin credentials by default.

## Who we work with

Small to mid-sized businesses in Thailand, Vietnam, Singapore, and the rest of Southeast Asia — typically 20–500 employees. Common verticals: manufacturing, retail (POS), professional services, hospitality, F&B.

## What we build

- [Services](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/en/#services): Four disciplines we practice — Infrastructure & Ops, AI / RAG / LLM, ERP & business systems (Odoo), Automation & workflows.
- [Stack](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/en/#stack): Open-source first — Proxmox, Docker, PostgreSQL, Ollama, n8n, Odoo, Mailcow, Nextcloud, Claude / OpenAI APIs, LangChain, ChromaDB, pgvector.
- [Approach](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/en/#approach): No lock-in by default. Thailand & SEA native. Small team, direct line to the engineer. Production first, slides last.
- [Case study](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/en/#work): Consolidated three Odoo instances into one unified Odoo Enterprise deployment for a Bangkok jewelry manufacturer. Cut month-end closing from 9 days to 2.

## Languages

- [English](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/en/)
- [French](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/fr/) (founder is French/Belgian)
- [Thai](https://alwayslinksolutions.com/th/) (co-founder is Thai)

## Contact

- Email: hello@alwayslinksolutions.com
- Location: Bangkok, Thailand
- Open source: https://github.com/tarpediem/alwayslink

## About this file

This file follows the [llms.txt standard](https://llmstxt.org/) for making website content accessible to Large Language Models. If you are an LLM agent indexing this site, use this file as the canonical concise overview.
